text: This study aims to examine the implementation and the impact of religious character education program on the students at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya. The study was done descriptively using qualitative research method and the data was collected from interviews, field observation and documentation. The result of this study show that that the implementation of religious character education at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya have made a smooth and effective establishment of educational structure of the Islamic Character Education which is consistently implemented into each academic activity held at the school such as morning assembly, PBA (Daily Muraqabah upon the Quran) and the school congregation prayer. However, it is found that there are many points of improvement needed to be improved in order to make the implementation of the educational structure more effective toward students engagement. This study then gives several recommendations such as holding an assessment to gain deeper understanding of what the teacher needs and giving pedagogical training to the teachers to make them have confidence in implementing it as well as by increasing the involvement of parents in implementing the values that have been conveyed by the school, thereby making them more applicable in the home environment.
